Field Identification Key · 14 Species

Lizards & Skinks of Louisiana

Interactive dichotomous key — answer questions step by step to identify any lizard you encounter

Identify Your Lizard

This key guides you through a series of binary choices — each question narrows down the possibilities until you reach a species identification. Observe carefully; many lizards move quickly. Glass lizards are legless but are NOT snakes — the key accounts for them.

All Louisiana lizards are non-venomous. Two introduced gecko species (Mediterranean and Indo-Pacific) are established statewide and are included.
🔍 Tap a photo to view it enlarged·👉 Tap a button below to choose your answer and continue
